overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade in Night City at dusk. The character stops to lean against an orange railing overlooking the neon-lit cityscape while conversing with an NPC, then continues walking under covered walkways lined with holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path toward the orange railing overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated WNS signage and cyan neon accents
tall palm tree lining the promenade walkway
bright orange metal railing along the waterfront edge
tall dark building with glowing 06 signage near the top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide concrete promenade at dusk, passing palm trees and futuristic buildings illuminated with neon lights. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches an orange safety railing overlooking the waterfront, with the cyberpunk cityscape visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with orange safety railing

events.description: character stops walking and leans against the orange railing to look at the city view
flying vehicle passes by in the distance above the cityscape

agents.ego_description: leaning against the railing and looking out over the neon-lit cityscape while occasionally glancing at the NPC beside her

notable_agents.action: male NPC standing next to the character, also looking out at the city view

entered.detail: man in light blue shirt and beige pants standing by the railing
tall illuminated tower with bright vertical lighting visible across the water
large glowing advertisements and digital displays on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the orange railing overlooking the waterfront, joining an NPC to admire the cyberpunk cityscape. The camera pans around the stationary character, capturing the neon-lit skyline, holographic billboards, and flying vehicles in the distance. The warm dusk sky contrasts with the cool cyan and orange artificial lighting of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: character pushes off the railing and resumes walking along the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking away from the railing and continuing along the covered pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: arched metal structure with integrated lighting covering the pedestrian path
large holographic screens displaying advertisements along the walkway
distinctive orange textured pavement tiles under the covered section

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the railing and walks away from the NPC, continuing along a covered section of the promenade. The environment features orange paved surfaces, arched metal structures overhead, and numerous digital billboards and neon signs lining the path. The camera follows from behind as the character moves deeper into the futuristic urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from an open coastal walk to a dense, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by following the character from behind past palm trees and glowing buildings toward an orange safety railing overlooking the water. As the character stops to join an NPC, the camera pans around them to reveal a sprawling cyberpunk skyline filled with holographic billboards and flying vehicles under a contrasting dusk sky. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the railing and moves away from the NPC, entering a covered section of the promenade. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the city, passing under arched metal structures and through a corridor of vibrant digital signs and orange paved surfaces.
